description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a slim build, standing with one hand on the hip and the other arm relaxed. The individual is dressed in a short-sleeve collared shirt and fitted pants featuring a prominent side stripe. The pants have a slightly shiny texture, suggesting a synthetic or coated fabric, and the person is wearing sturdy, closed-toe shoes. The hairstyle is voluminous and curly, styled away from the face. The overall appearance is casual yet stylish, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A casually dressed adult standing with one hand on the hip, wearing a collared shirt, striped pants, and sturdy shoes, with a voluminous curly hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, collared shirt, and the full length of the striped pants.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the shirt, pants, and the person's posture with one hand on the hip.
description_view_2: Side-rear view emphasizing the side stripe on the pants and the arm position.
description_view_3: Side-front view showing the profile of the face, shirt, and the hand resting on the hip.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve collared shirt and fitted pants with a side stripe
attribute_posture: standing with one hand on hip
